历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11829 → 10395 → → 13559 → 8295. In 2024, it significantly shifted backward to 13559, then sharply moved forward to 8295 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of over 5000 positions in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 8295. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in this province was 29 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 33 in 2024, and 32 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 32, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science Main Ranking approximately 80th in 2026, 79th in 2025, stable in the 79–83 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. In 2025, reputation was somewhat negative (sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors), and in 2026, reputation remains somewhat negative (academic misconduct incident). Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 77th). Regarding admission anomalies, there were low-attention gap signals in 2025. Overall reputation is somewhat negative, which may suppress application enthusiasm. Management Science and Engineering is rated A (fifth round of discipline evaluation, A level), the only A-level discipline at this university. Engineering majors such as Mechanical Engineering and Computer Science rely on the main campus's disciplinary strength and are offered at the Xuancheng Campus.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have high social popularity/recommendation, aligning with the university's science and engineering orientation. In Jilin Province, the total number of examinees in 2026 is approximately 110,868, a slight decrease from 2025 (111,492), leading to a slight easing of competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant forward shift in 2025 rankings, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight decrease in the total number of examinees in this province, and somewhat negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward by about 50 positions from the 2025 baseline of 8295, resulting in a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 8345, with a range of 7845–8845.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Software Engineering (Xuancheng Campus)
- Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control (Xuancheng Campus)
- Intelligent Science and Technology (Xuancheng Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical Engineering (Xuancheng Campus)
- Materials Forming and Control Engineering (Xuancheng Campus)
- Earth Information Science and Technology (Xuancheng Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics (Xuancheng Campus)
- Logistics Management (Digital Intelligence Logistics) (Xuancheng Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7845–8845, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<7845), you can focus on aiming for popular majors such as Software Engineering and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>8845), it is recommended to primarily use Tier 3 majors as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2164 → 2056 → → 2292 → 2202, with recent fluctuations between 2056 and 2292, overall stable, with a baseline of about 2202 in 2025; the provincial History Category enrollment plan remained at 6 students from 2021 to 2026, unchanged for six consecutive years, with no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 80th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities, with stable appeal to liberal arts candidates; reputation was somewhat negative in 2025 (sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors), and somewhat negative in 2026 (academic misconduct incident); Douyin popularity is average. Overall reputation is somewhat negative, but mainly affects science and engineering majors, with relatively limited impact on liberal arts majors; Management Science and Engineering is rated A (main campus), with no direct disciplinary connection to History Category enrollment majors (English, Network and New Media); liberal arts majors mainly rely on the main campus's humanities and social science resources.
